mechanism_narrative: Rising CPIAUCSL indicates persistent inflationary pressure that forces central banks to maintain restrictive policy, compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC exceeds 0.05 over 3-year rolling windows or positive 20d returns exceed 60% during rising CPI periods.

mechanism_narrative: A sudden spike in UNRATE above 4.2% signals rapid labor market deterioration that triggers immediate risk-off positioning, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns within 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Signal triggers but 5d forward returns are positive in > 55% of cases, or t-stat for mean return difference is insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in GDPC1 and RSAFS confirms broad-based consumer and business demand growth that sustains corporate earnings momentum, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in GDPC1 and RSAFS coincides with negative 60d returns in > 50% of observations, or interaction term loses statistical significance.

mechanism_narrative: Declining INDPRO during a late-cycle expansion reflects supply-side bottlenecks and margin compression that outweigh demand resilience, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines in late-cycle regimes produce positive 20d returns > 60% of the time, or regime-specific IC is not significantly different from zero.

mechanism_narrative: Higher FEDFUNDS levels increase borrowing costs and discount rates applied to future cash flows, mechanically suppressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns within 5 trading days.
failure_condition: FEDFUNDS level shows no monotonic relationship with 5d returns, or Rank IC remains below 0.02 across all rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: HOUST exceeding 1500 thousand units signals robust housing market activity that amplifies wealth effects and consumer spending, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: HOUST > 1500 triggers but 60d forward returns are negative in > 55% of cases, or predictive accuracy does not exceed random baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Rising PAYEMS combined with stable UNRATE indicates healthy job creation without wage-price spiral risks, supporting corporate revenue growth and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint condition of rising PAYEMS and stable UNRATE fails to predict positive 20d returns, or interaction effect is statistically indistinguishable from zero.

mechanism_narrative: FEDFUNDS above 4.5% during a monetary tightening cycle enforces sustained financial conditions tightening that caps equity multiples and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: FEDFUNDS > 4.5% in tightening regimes yields positive 60d returns > 60% of the time, or regime-conditional predictive power vanishes in out-of-sample testing.
